name: Toffee Squares
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Mae Fautsch
Preheat oven to 350°F. Lightly grease a 12x16 cookie sheet.
Cream butter and sugar until light in color. Add egg yolk, blend well. Blend in flour. Spread mixture as thinly as possible on the cookie sheet. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until lightly browned. While still warm, spread chocolate bar over top. Sprinkle nuts while chocolate is still soft. Let cool so topping hardens before cutting into small squares.
